user.title: Location & radius
user.description: Configure where to search for aircraft. Defaults to your Home Assistant home location.

apis.title: API keys (optional)
apis.description: All fields are optional. OpenSky OAuth increases rate limits. AviationStack provides live departure/arrival times (free tier: 1000 calls/month). AeroDataBox (RapidAPI) provides live route data by ICAO24. Cache dir shares manual overrides from closest-plane-app.
